title: GitHub Integration + PR Management
boundary: GitHub Integration + PR Management — OAuth flow, PR creation from session changes, CI/CD status display in desktop
consumer_purpose: Allow desktop users to authenticate with GitHub, create PRs from session changes, and view CI/CD status on PRs without leaving the app
claim_atoms: User can authenticate with GitHub via OAuth (PKCE flow, browser-based, callback via deep link)
User can see current GitHub auth status in settings
User can create a PR from session changes (diff → commit → PR)
GitHub auth token is encrypted at rest via Electron safeStorage
OAuth uses PKCE flow with deep-link callback handled in parseGitHubOAuthCallback
IPC proxy validates destination hostnames against allowlist [api.github.com, uploads.github.com]

  "plan": {
    "plan_id": "github-integration-ui",
    "title": "GitHub Integration + PR Management",
    "boundary": "GitHub Integration + PR Management — OAuth flow, PR creation from session changes, CI/CD status display in desktop",
    "consumer_purpose": "Allow desktop users to authenticate with GitHub, create PRs from session changes, and view CI/CD status on PRs without leaving the app",
    "revision": 2,
    "generated_at": "2026-05-30T04:00:00Z",
    "revision_notes": "Revision 2 resolves 3 blocking findings from prepublication review: F1 (safeStorage encryption for token storage), F2 (PKCE OAuth flow + deep-links.ts callback handler), F3 (IPC proxy URL validation with allowlist). Fix-B and Fix-E are updated with security measures. 3 new claim atoms added.",
    "root_causes": [
      {
        "id": "rc-1",
        "hypothesis": "parseGitHubRemote() is dead code — zero production callers. Test imports from a non-existent module path breaking it.",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "packages/opencode/src/util/repository.ts:213 defines parseGitHubRemote()",
          "packages/opencode/test/cli/github-remote.test.ts:2 imports from '../../src/cli/cmd/github' which does not exist",
          "Zero imports of parseGitHubRemote in production code"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "rc-2",
        "hypothesis": "No PR creation code exists anywhere — greenfield development needed",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "No imports of @octokit/rest in packages/opencode/src/",

        ]

      {
        "id": "rc-3",
        "hypothesis": "No GitHub OAuth flow exists in the desktop app — existing OAuth patterns are for providers (dialog-connect-provider.tsx), MCP (PKCE), and Copilot (device code)",
        "confidence": "high",
        "evidence": [
          "dialog-connect-provider.tsx implements provider OAuth but targets the SDK provider API, not GitHub directly",
          "onDeepLink IPC channel exists but has no GitHub OAuth callback handler",
          "No electron-store namespace for GitHub tokens",
          "safeStorage is not used anywhere in the codebase — token would be plaintext JSON"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "fixes": [
      {
        "id": "fix-A",
        "description": "Revive and expose parseGitHubRemote() — fix the stale test import, add it to the RepositoryCache service, and ensure it's callable from the app package",
        "files": [
          "packages/opencode/test/cli/github-remote.test.ts",
          "packages/opencode/src/util/repository.ts",
          "packages/opencode/src/reference/repository-cache.ts"
        ],
        "before": "parseGitHubRemote() exists at repository.ts:213 but has zero production callers. Test imports from non-existent path. RepositoryCache has no method for GitHub remote extraction.",
        "after": "Fix test import path. Export parseGitHubRemote from repository.ts. Add parseGitHubRemote() method to RepositoryCache.Service interface and implement it in the layer. Add types.{PullRequest, Branch, etc.} near the repository code.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/opencode/test/cli/github-remote.test.ts",
            "packages/opencode/src/reference/repository-cache.ts",
            "packages/opencode/src/util/repository.ts"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": [
            "bun test --filter 'github-remote' in packages/opencode",
            "bun test --filter 'repository-cache' in packages/opencode"
          ]
        },
        "risks": [
          "parseGitHubRemote returns null for non-GitHub remotes — callers must handle null",
          "Test may have drifted from function signature — verify after import fix"
        ],
        "validation": [
          "Run 'bun test --filter github-remote' — all 12 test cases should pass",
          "Run 'bun typecheck' in packages/opencode"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "fix-B",
        "description": "Create GitHub OAuth token store with safeStorage encryption in main process, PKCE OAuth flow, IPC bridge, and deep-links.ts callback handler. Token is never stored as plaintext.",
        "files": [
          "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts",
          "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts",
          "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts",
          "packages/app/src/pages/layout/deep-links.ts"
        ],
        "before": "No GitHub auth storage. No PKCE OAuth flow. No deep-link handler for github-oauth. Any token stored via generic store-set would be plaintext JSON in app.getPath('userData').",
        "after": "Add 'github-auth' to RESERVED_STORE_NAMES (prevents generic store-get/set from accessing it). Add safeStorage-encrypted token storage: on write, safeStorage.encryptString(token) returns Buffer, Buffer.toString('base64') stored in electron-store; on read, retrieve base64 string, Buffer.from(base64, 'base64'), safeStorage.decryptString(buffer) returns plaintext token for in-memory use only. Token is never persisted as plaintext. Add PKCE OAuth flow: generate code_verifier (crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('base64url')), compute code_challenge (base64url(sha256(code_verifier))), generate state param for CSRF, store both in ephemeral Map<string, {verifier, state}>, open shell.openExternal to GitHub authorize URL with code_challenge=S256. Deep-link callback URL (opencode://github-oauth?code=...&state=...) is received by sendDeepLinks → onDeepLink IPC. deep-links.ts gets parseGitHubOAuthCallback exported function that extracts code and state from the URL's searchParams. The code+state are forwarded to main process via ipcRenderer.invoke('github-oauth-callback', code, state). Main process validates state against stored value, then POSTs code + code_verifier + client_id to https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token. Response token is stored via safeStorage. IPC handlers: github-oauth-start, github-oauth-callback, github-get-token (decrypt from store), github-clear-token. Preload bridge methods: githubStartOAuth, githubGetToken, githubSetToken, githubClearToken. ElectronAPI type extended with all four methods.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts",
            "packages/app/src/pages/layout/deep-links.ts"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": [
            "bun typecheck in packages/desktop",
            "bun typecheck in packages/app",
            "Manual: start desktop, verify IPC bridge registers",
            "Manual: verify safeStorage.encryptString roundtrip — write token, restart, read token"
          ]
        },
        "risks": [
          "safeStorage may return null on systems without a keychain (headless Linux). Must handle — fall back to error message rather than plaintext store.",
          "safeStorage.encryptString returns Buffer — must convert to base64 for JSON-safe store serialization. Buffer.toString('base64') on write, Buffer.from(base64, 'base64') on read. Validated in the main process.",
          "PKCE code_verifier is stored in-memory (ephemeral Map in ipc.ts module scope). If the app is restarted mid-flow, user must re-authenticate. Acceptable v1 tradeoff — no cross-session state persistence for partial OAuth flows.",
          "GitHub OAuth App client_id must be registered and injected via config. Hardcoding client_id is acceptable per OAuth public client spec (PKCE). No client_secret needed.",
          "deep-links.ts currently handles open-project and new-session hostnames. Adding github-oauth hostname is safe — it's an additive export, no existing consumers change.",
          "onDeepLink is consumed once — OAuth callback URL must not interfere with other pending deep links. The parseGitHubOAuthCallback function returns null if hostname !== 'github-oauth', so non-oauth deep links pass through unchanged.",
          "safeStorage availability check: safeStorage.isEncryptionAvailable() must guard all encrypt/decrypt calls."
        ],
        "validation": [
          "bun typecheck in packages/desktop",
          "bun typecheck in packages/app",
          "Verify preload bridge exposes githubStartOAuth, githubGetToken, githubClearToken",
          "Verify 'github-auth' store is reserved (generic store-get/store-set reject it)",
          "Verify safeStorage roundtrip: encrypt string, store as base64, read base64, decrypt — yields original string",
          "Verify safeStorage.isEncryptionAvailable() guard returns true on macOS/Windows, false on headless Linux",
          "Verify parseGitHubOAuthCallback extracts code and state from deep-link URL, returns null for non-github-oauth hostnames"
        ]
      },

        "id": "fix-C",
        "description": "Create GitHub API service layer in @opencode-ai/core using @octokit/rest — PR creation, branch operations, and CI/CD status fetching",

        "after": "Create packages/opencode/src/github/ with Effect service pattern: GitHubService with methods createPullRequest(diff, branch, message), getPullRequestStatus(owner, repo, prNumber), listPullRequests(owner, repo). Types: GitHubConfig (token), PullRequest, CheckRun, PullRequestStatus. Exported from @opencode-ai/core index. Service supports two modes: direct (CLI with @octokit/rest) and proxy mode (desktop renderer calls via IPC proxy — fix-E). Proxy mode injects a fetch-like adapter that routes through github-api-proxy IPC handler.",

Add PR status badges to message timeline when a PR is associated with a session. Add 'Create Pull Request...' menu item to File menu in desktop-menu.ts. Add i18n strings under github.* namespace.",

        ],
        "validation": [

          "bun typecheck in packages/desktop (desktop-menu.ts change affects ElectronAPI type)",

      {
        "id": "fix-E",
        "description": "Wire GitHub API calls through desktop IPC proxy with URL allowlist validation — reject arbitrary URL proxying",
        "files": [
          "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts",
          "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts",
          "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts"
        ],
        "before": "GitHub API calls from renderer would fail due to CORS. No IPC proxy exists. Any proxy would be an open relay without URL validation.",
        "after": "Add github-api-proxy IPC handler in ipc.ts that: (1) validates the request URL against an allowlist before forwarding; (2) attaches the stored auth token server-side (never exposed to renderer); (3) uses Electron's net.fetch in main process. URL validation: parse with URL.canParse(url) && new URL(url).hostname, match against ALLOWED_GITHUB_HOSTNAMES = ['api.github.com', 'uploads.github.com']. Reject invalid URLs with typed GitHubProxyError containing the rejected hostname and allowed hostnames. Token is fetched from safeStorage-decrypted electron-store inside the handler, not passed from renderer. Add githubApiProxy(url, options) to ElectronAPI type and bridge.",
        "impact": {
          "affected_files": [
            "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts",
            "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts"
          ],
          "tests_to_run": [
            "bun typecheck in packages/desktop"
          ]
        },
        "risks": [
          "API proxy in main process bypasses Content Security Policy of renderer — ensure token is never leaked to renderer (token is attached server-side, renderer only sends URL + request body)",
          "Rate limiting and error handling must be propagated correctly — reject non-200 responses with structured GitHubProxyError",
          "URL validation must use URL.canParse check and hostname extraction — not regex-based which can be bypassed via redirect or path tricks",
          "net.fetch is experimental in some Electron versions — fall back to global fetch if net.fetch is unavailable",
          "ALLOWED_GITHUB_HOSTNAMES must also cover uploads.github.com for file attachments in PRs",
          "GitHubProxyError must be serializable through IPC (structured clone) — use a plain object with type, hostname, allowedHostnames fields"
        ],
        "validation": [
          "bun typecheck in packages/desktop",
          "Verify github-api-proxy handler rejects URLs with hostname !== 'api.github.com' and 'uploads.github.com'",
          "Verify token is attached server-side using safeStorage.decrypt, not passed from renderer",
          "Verify GitHubProxyError is structured clone-safe: {type: 'GitHubProxyError', hostname: string, allowedHostnames: string[]}",
          "Verify URL.canParse is used before constructing new URL() for safety"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "apply_order": ["fix-A", "fix-B", "fix-C", "fix-D", "fix-E"],
    "dependencies": {
      "fix-A": [],
      "fix-B": [],
      "fix-C": ["fix-A", "fix-B"],
      "fix-D": ["fix-A", "fix-B", "fix-C"],
      "fix-E": ["fix-B", "fix-C"]
    },
    "risks": [
      "Shared file contention: packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts (ElectronAPI) is modified by multiple concurrent lanes (MCP, agents, plugins). Use produce_fragment for additions.",
      "Shared file contention: packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts (RESERVED_STORE_NAMES, handlers) is modified by multiple lanes. Use produce_fragment for handler additions.",
      "Shared file contention: packages/app/src/i18n/en.ts is modified by multiple lanes. Use produce_fragment for i18n key additions.",
      "Shared file contention: packages/app/src/pages/layout/deep-links.ts is modified by this lane — verify no concurrent lane touches it. If contention, use produce_fragment for parseGitHubOAuthCallback export.",
      "OAuth uses PKCE flow (no client_secret). GitHub OAuth App client_id must be registered. Client_id is embeddable in the desktop app per OAuth public client spec.",
      "safeStorage requires a system keychain (macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager, Linux libsecret). On headless Linux without libsecret, safeStorage.isEncryptionAvailable() returns false. Plan requires a graceful error in this case — user sees 'System keychain not available' rather than falling back to plaintext.",
      "safeStorage.encryptString returns a Buffer — must convert to/from base64 for JSON-safe electron-store serialization.",
      "PKCE code_verifier is in-memory only (ephemeral Map). App restart during OAuth flow requires re-authentication. Acceptable v1 tradeoff.",
      "@octokit/rest is declared in packages/opencode/package.json but is in 'dependencies' — ensure tree-shaking removes it if unused or use peer dependency.",
      "DesktopMenuAction union type change ripples to ElectronAPI — must update type in sync.",
      "i18n github.* keys must work in 16 locale files — verify fallback behavior before adding only to en.ts.",
      "GitHub API service must support two modes: direct Octokit (CLI) and proxy adapter (desktop renderer). The proxy adapter routes fetch calls through electronAPI.githubApiProxy to avoid CORS."
    ],
    "rollback_plan": "Revert fixes in reverse order: fix-E (remove github-api-proxy handler + bridge + URL validation), fix-D (revert review-tab changes, remove i18n keys, revert desktop-menu), fix-C (delete github/ directory, revert index.ts), fix-B (remove github-auth store + safeStorage helpers + PKCE handlers + deep-links.ts callback + preload bridge methods, revert ipc.ts/preload changes), fix-A (revert repository-cache.ts and test changes)",
    "validation_strategy": {
      "step_1": "bun typecheck in packages/opencode (fix-A, fix-C)",
      "step_2": "bun typecheck in packages/desktop (fix-B, fix-E)",
      "step_3": "bun typecheck in packages/app (fix-B deep-links, fix-D)",
      "step_4": "bun test --filter 'github-remote' in packages/opencode (fix-A validation)",
      "step_5": "Verify 'github-auth' store is reserved and rejects generic store access",
      "step_6": "Verify safeStorage roundtrip: encrypt → base64 store → base64 read → decrypt matches original",
      "step_7": "Verify github-api-proxy rejects non-allowlist URLs (curl test or unit test)",
      "step_8": "Verify parseGitHubOAuthCallback returns {code, state} for valid URL, null for other hostnames",
      "step_9": "Full regression: bun typecheck in packages/opencode + packages/app + packages/desktop simultaneously"
    },
    "shared_file_coordination": {
      "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts": "Use produce_fragment to add githubStartOAuth, githubGetToken, githubClearToken, githubApiProxy to ElectronAPI",
      "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts": "Use produce_fragment to add RESERVED_STORE_NAMES entry ('github-auth'), safeStorage helpers, PKCE OAuth handlers, github-api-proxy handler, and imports (safeStorage, crypto, net)",
      "packages/app/src/i18n/en.ts": "Use produce_fragment to add github.* i18n keys",
      "packages/app/src/desktop-menu.ts": "Use produce_fragment to add DesktopMenuAction union member and DESKTOP_MENU entry",
      "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts": "Use produce_fragment to add github* and githubApiProxy bridge methods",
      "packages/app/src/pages/layout/deep-links.ts": "Use produce_fragment to add parseGitHubOAuthCallback export"
    },
    "new_files": [
      "packages/opencode/src/github/service.ts — Effect service wrapping @octokit/rest with dual-mode (direct + proxy adapter)",
      "packages/opencode/src/github/types.ts — GitHub types (PullRequest, CheckRun, GitHubConfig, etc.)",
      "packages/opencode/src/github/index.ts — re-exports"
    ],
    "modified_files": [
      "packages/opencode/test/cli/github-remote.test.ts — fix import path",
      "packages/opencode/src/reference/repository-cache.ts — add parseGitHubRemote()",
      "packages/opencode/src/util/repository.ts — ensure parseGitHubRemote is exported",

      "packages/desktop/src/main/ipc.ts — add RESERVED_STORE_NAMES entry, safeStorage helpers, PKCE OAuth handlers, github-api-proxy with URL allowlist, imports",
      "packages/desktop/src/preload/types.ts — add github* ElectronAPI methods (githubStartOAuth, githubGetToken, githubClearToken, githubApiProxy)",
      "packages/desktop/src/preload/index.ts — wire github* bridge methods",
      "packages/app/src/pages/layout/deep-links.ts — add parseGitHubOAuthCallback export for github-oauth hostname deep linking",
      "packages/app/src/pages/session/review-tab.tsx — add PR creation UI",
      "packages/app/src/pages/session/message-timeline.tsx — add PR status indicators",
      "packages/app/src/i18n/en.ts — add github.* keys",
      "packages/app/src/desktop-menu.ts — add Create PR menu item"
    ]
  }
}
revision_notes: Revision 2 resolves 3 blocking prepublication findings. F1: safeStorage.encryptString/decryptString added to fix-B for token at-rest encryption. F2: PKCE flow specified and chosen for OAuth; deep-links.ts added to modified_files with parseGitHubOAuthCallback export. F3: URL validation with allowlist [api.github.com, uploads.github.com] added to fix-E with typed GitHubProxyError. 3 new claim atoms added for security measures (total now 6). All existing 5 fixes A-E remain valid with modifications.
